name: no-more-caffeine
title: No More Caffeine
description: Instead of just tracking *total daily intake*, estimate the *remaining caffeine in the body* and use that plus time of day to determine whether additional caffeine is likely to disturb sleep.
author: atsushi_kawamura

commands.name: log-caffeine
commands.title: Log Caffeine
commands.description: Log a caffeine intake and see predicted residual levels

commands.name: todays-caffeine
commands.title: Today's Caffeine
commands.description: View intake history and current residual caffeine levels

commands.name: caffeine-settings
commands.title: Caffeine Settings
commands.description: Configure bedtime, half-life, thresholds, and custom drinks

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Caffeine Status
commands.description: Show current caffeine status in menu bar

preferences.name: bedtime
preferences.title: Bedtime
preferences.description: Your usual bedtime in HH:mm format (e.g., 22:00)

preferences.name: halfLife
preferences.title: Caffeine Half-Life (hours)
preferences.description: How many hours it takes for half the caffeine to be eliminated (default: 5)

preferences.name: maxCaffeineAtBedtime
preferences.title: Max Residual Caffeine at Bedtime (mg)
preferences.description: Maximum allowed residual caffeine at bedtime (default: 50 mg)

preferences.name: dailyMaxCaffeine
preferences.title: Daily Max Caffeine (mg)
preferences.description: Optional: Maximum total caffeine intake per day (average: 200-400 mg)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
